examples: Seven second-class passengers prepared to disembark.
First-class passengers enjoy "élite" security lines and priority boarding, and disembark before the unwashed in coach, held at bay by a flight attendant, are allowed to foul the jet-way.
It is still unclear whether they will disembark at all.
As evening descends, passengers disembark the train for traditional haciendas and a local dinner before heading to bed.
Dale Connone was getting ready to disembark from the boat's side exit when the ferry crashed.
